item.title: Types of vacation packers
item.description: Edith Pritchett cartoon on summer holidays, travelers.

item.title: AI doesn’t need a regulator. It needs a referee.
item.description: Here's a better way to incentivize tech companies to create safe AI products.

item.title: Will the Ukraine war force Putin's exit?
item.description: Has the Ukraine war done more damage to Russia than we've heard? In this episode of "Make It Make Sense," Adam O’Neal sits down with David Ignatius to discuss how the war is going, what Ukraine's future holds and what Russia would look like without Vladimir Putin.

item.title: Brain rot is good, actually
item.description: Memes, social media, redistricting and six-seven other topics, in readers’ eyes.

item.title: I did something AI never could: Make my calculus teacher cry
item.description: AI’s ’first draft’ problem, the Iran war and Kash Patel, in readers’ eyes.

item.title: Why did Britain lose the colonies? The reason was clear since 1776.
item.description: Richard and William Howe were told to crush the rebels — and bring peace.

item.title: The curtain is closing on Keir Starmer
item.description: The prime minister is paying a price for not getting Britain’s fiscal house in order.

item.title: The wellness industry has crowned a new health food
item.description: Edith Pritchett cartoon on wellness industry, food health trends.

item.title: Donald Trump’s incredibly reckless second term
item.description: A presidency stripped of restraints — and turned toward profit.

item.title: Is life better in Europe? It's not so simple.
item.description: Europe promises a life many Americans envy: longer vacations, universal health care, beautiful cities and a slower pace. But those benefits come with trade-offs. Host Megan McArdle looks past the usual America versus Europe arguments to explore what economic indicators reveal about quality of life.

item.title: All this ‘talent’ breaks my brain — and my heart
item.description: AI fakery is overwhelming. What will happen to human imagination?

item.title: Never forget
item.description: Michael Ramirez cartoon on Memorial Day.

item.title: The bond markets are punishing America
item.description: Spiking Treasury yields are highlighting the unsustainability of federal spending.
